title: Sitovo
summary:
Sitovo (Bulgarian: Ситово, pronounced [ˈsitovo]) may refer to the following Bulgarian villages:

Sitovo, Plovdiv Province
Sitovo, Silistra Province, the administrative centre of Sitovo municipality
Sitovo, Yambol Province
Sitovo - in Poland
text:
Sitovo (Bulgarian: Ситово, pronounced [ˈsitovo]) may refer to the following Bulgarian villages:

Sitovo, Plovdiv Province
Sitovo, Silistra Province, the administrative centre of Sitovo municipality
Sitovo, Yambol Province
Sitovo - in Poland
